name: Orange Hollandaise
recipeInstructions:
(From "The New Basics" by Julee Rosso and Sheila Lukins)
1. Pour the orange juice into a saucepan and bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer until thick and syrupy, about 10-12 minutes. The mixture should reduce to about 1/4 cup.
3. Set aside. In another saucepan, melt butter slowly in a thin stream.
4. Continue processing for a few more seconds until it thickens.
5. Serve immediately. Makes 2 cups; serves 4.
